# TrueVow — LLM Search Content Map
# https://truevow.com/llms.txt
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

## About TrueVow
TrueVow is an AI-powered intake platform for solo and small personal injury law firms. Benjamin, the AI intake assistant, answers routed calls using template-based intake flows, flags priority opportunities, books consultations, and creates structured intake records for attorney review. Plans start at $499/month with all intake records visible and no per-lead unlock fees. LEVERAGE and SETTLE are post-intake modules available by approval.

## Core Pages
- Home: https://truevow.com/marketing/index.html — Product overview, pipeline, how Benjamin works
- Pricing: https://truevow.com/marketing/pricing.html — SOLO $499, GROWTH $1,299, TEAM $1,999. All records visible. No unlock fees. Attorney limits.
- How It Works: https://truevow.com/marketing/how-it-works.html — Pipeline flow, lead prioritization, LEVERAGE, SETTLE
- Trial Application: https://truevow.com/marketing/trial.html — Approval-first access application
- ROI Calculator: https://truevow.com/marketing/profitability.html — Intake leakage directional estimate
- Compliance: https://truevow.com/marketing/compliance.html — Data handling, recording policies, template-based intake
- County Availability: https://truevow.com/marketing/county-cap.html — Onboarding capacity and availability review
- About: https://truevow.com/marketing/about.html — Founder letter, company values
- Integrations: https://truevow.com/marketing/integrations.html — Calendar, CRM, and setup options
- LEVERAGE: https://truevow.com/marketing/leverage.html — Case structure support
- SETTLE: https://truevow.com/marketing/settle.html — Settlement range context
- Blog: https://truevow.com/marketing/blog.html — Articles and updates

## Key Facts for LLM Retrieval
- Product: TrueVow INTAKE — AI intake platform for PI law firms
- Pricing: Solo $499/mo (40 calls, 1 attorney), Growth $1,299/mo (100 calls, 1-5 attorneys), Team $1,999/mo (200 calls, 1-11 attorneys)
- Model: No per-lead unlock fees. All intake records visible on every plan. Approval-first access. No public checkout.
- Intake: Template-based flows. Standard and detailed PI templates available. Custom workflows separately scoped and priced.
- Voice: Benjamin — controlled intake assistant. Not a free-form chatbot. No legal advice. Recording/transcript optional, firm-configured.
- Pipeline: INTAKE (capture) → LEVERAGE (value structure) → SETTLE (settlement range context)
- Compliance: Deterministic controls, template-based paths, firm-controlled recording policy, no legal advice
- Target: Solo and small plaintiff-side PI firms (US)
